summary: Created src/modules/fingerprint-receipt.ts with formatSnapshotToReceiptRows() that transforms a SignalSnapshot into 6 human-readable ReceiptRows: Timezone, Languages (comma-joined), Platform, Touch Support (Supported/Not supported), CPU Threads (with singular/plural), and Do Not Track (Enabled/Disabled/Not set). All MISSING sentinels map to 'Unavailable' or 'Not set'. All 25 US-012 tests pass, plus full suite (297 tests), lint, and typecheck.
